data.title: 1520ai and Hospice Analytics Announce Strategic Combination to Advance Data-Driven Hospice Care and AI Innovation
data.description: 1520ai has announced the acquisition of Hospice Analytics, with the latter set to maintain its branding, products, and services under the parent company. Cordt Kassner, the Founder of Hospice Analytics, will remain at the helm of operations. This strategic move was finalized in Chicago on April 29, 2026. The website for 1520ai can be accessed at www.1520.ai, while Hospice Analytics can be found at http://www.hospiceanalytics.com.

data.title: Airbus CEO Flags Middle East Risk As Weak Deliveries Hit Q1
data.description: Airbus SE, a major aircraft manufacturer, recently released its first-quarter 2026 financial results, showing a decline in performance due to lower commercial aircraft deliveries. The company reported a GAAP EPS of 0.74 euros, a decrease from 1.01 euros the previous year. Adjusted EBIT also fell to 300 million euros from 624 million euros. Revenue experienced a 7% decline to 12.7 billion euros, with reported EBIT dropping to 224 million euros from 473 million euros. EBIT margin narrowed to 1.8% from 3.5%, while adjusted EBIT margin decreased to 2.4% from 4.6%. In U.S. dollars, Airbus recorded first-quarter EPS of 22 cents and revenue of $14.81 billion. The company delivered 114 commercial aircraft, down from 136 last year, while net commercial orders increased to 398 aircraft, resulting in a backlog of 9,037. Defense operations partly offset the decline in commercial performance.

data.title: Patriot Growth Insurance Services Promotes Greg Feigenbaum to Vice President, National Employee Benefits Practice Leader
data.description: In Fort Washington, Pennsylvania, on April 29, 2026, Patriot Growth Insurance Services, known as Patriot, a rapidly expanding insurance brokerage firm, has appointed Greg Feigenbaum as the Vice President and National Employee Benefits Practice Leader. This promotion reflects Patriot's commitment to growth and development in the industry. Greg Feigenbaum, a seasoned professional with extensive experience, will now lead the national employee benefits practice at Patriot. This move signifies a strategic decision as Patriot continues to strengthen its position in the market.

data.title: RED PHONE BOOTH HOSTS NATIONWIDE KENTUCKY DERBY WATCH PARTY ON MAY 2
data.description: An extravagant multi-city Kentucky Derby viewing event will be hosted at a luxurious speakeasy bar, offering craft cocktails, live music, Derby-themed attire, exclusive private event offers, and high-end cigar lounge services. Tickets can be purchased at redphonebooth.com. The event will take place on April 29, 2026, in Atlanta.

data.title: 5 Overlooked Tax Deductions That Can Reduce Your Tax Bill
data.description: Sarah Rosas highlights the significant impact of minor tax code details on savings. In Bonita Springs, Florida, on April 29, 2026, she emphasized that many Americans overlook deductions that could lower their taxable income. These missed deductions amount to millions annually. For example, deductions like mortgage interest, which are well-known, play a crucial role in reducing taxes owed.

data.title: Drones as a Service Emerges as Critical Infrastructure for Modern Business and Defense Ops
data.description: The aerial data and automation sector is forecasted to experience significant long-term growth, driven by the increasing adoption of Counter-Drones as a Service (DaaS). As of April 29, 2026, in New York, industry experts predict exponential expansion due to the growing reliance on aerial data and automation technologies. DaaS is emerging as a highly practical and scalable solution in the market. This trend signifies a shift towards innovative approaches, with DaaS expected to play a crucial role in the sector's growth trajectory. This development highlights the sector's potential for robust expansion, with significant opportunities on the horizon.

data.title: Power Solutions International Sets Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: The headquarters in Wood Dale, Illinois will be hosting a conference call to review the quarterly results and business forecast of Power Solutions International, Inc. (Nasdaq: PSIX) on May 11, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. EST. The company specializes in producing emission-certified engines and power systems, showcasing their expertise in design and engineering within the industry.

data.title: XRP eyes record ETF inflows in 2026, with price targeting $2.15 on strong support at $1.40 amid high institutional interest.
data.description: XRP's current technical indicators suggest a possible increase in value to $2.15, provided that it maintains support at $1.40. This forecast is reinforced by the continued high level of institutional interest in the cryptocurrency.

data.title: City of Plattsburgh, NY Selects OpenGov for Citywide ERP Transformation
data.description: A groundbreaking ERP collaboration in New York is set to streamline various operations such as billing, payroll, and permitting for enhanced efficiency and service provision. Recently announced in San Francisco on April 29, 2026, the city of Plattsburgh, New York, has partnered with OpenGov, a prominent AI-native Public Service provider. Through this partnership, the integration will amalgamate numerous functions to boost productivity and service quality.

data.title: FHLB CINCINNATI ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
data.description: On April 29, 2026, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Cincinnati (FHLB) disclosed their unaudited financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. During this period, the FHLB adeptly fulfilled its double objective.
